title: WaterBucketAutoSave
description: Automatically drops water when dropped from a bucket in slot 9
body:
**Water Bucket Auto Save - Your Automatic MLG Water Bucket Savior**

💧 Never die from fall damage again! Water Bucket Auto Save is the ultimate quality-of-life mod that automatically performs MLG water bucket saves when you're falling from dangerous heights.

📜 Overview

Water Bucket Auto Save is a lightweight Fabric mod that revolutionizes survival gameplay by automatically placing water buckets to prevent fall damage. Perfect for parkour, building, exploration, or just avoiding those embarrassing accidental deaths!

🎮 Key Features

🤖 Fully Automatic Protection

Smart Fall Detection - Automatically detects when you're falling from lethal heights (5+ blocks)

Instant Water Placement - Places water precisely beneath you before you hit the ground

Zero Player Input Required - Works completely hands-free once enabled

⚙️ Intelligent Mechanics

Hotbar Slot 9 Integration - Uses water buckets specifically from your 9th hotbar slot

Smart Activation - Only triggers when actually needed, won't activate in safe situations

State Management - Automatically resets if you land safely or conditions change

🎯 User-Friendly Design

Easy Toggle System - Enable/disable with a simple keybind (default: Y)

Visual Feedback - Clear chat messages show when the mod is active/saving you

Slot Preservation - Automatically returns to your original hotbar slot after saving

🔒 Safe & Non-Cheat

Client-Side Only - Works on any server without server-side modifications

Survival-Friendly - Uses your actual water buckets from inventory

Fair Gameplay - Doesn't give unfair advantages, just prevents accidental deaths

🕹️ How It Works

Prepare - Keep a water bucket in your 9th hotbar slot

Fall - Start falling from any dangerous height

Save - The mod automatically looks down and places water

Survive - Land safely in the water and continue your adventure!

⚡ Perfect For

Parkour Enthusiasts - Never fail those tricky jumps again

Builders & Architects - Work safely on tall structures

Explorers - Navigate mountains and caves with confidence

Clumsy Players - Automatic protection from accidental falls

Speedrunners - Consistent MLG saves without the stress

🔧 Technical Details

Fabric-Only - Requires Fabric API

Minecraft 1.20+ - Compatible with latest versions

Lightweight - Minimal performance impact

Configurable - Easy to enable/disable mid-game

📥 Installation

Install Fabric Loader & Fabric API

Download WaterBucketAutoSave.jar

Place in your mods folder

Launch Minecraft and never fear falling again!

💡 Pro Tips

Always keep your 9th hotbar slot filled with water buckets

Use the toggle keybind (Y) to disable during specific activities

Combine with feather falling for ultimate fall protection

Perfect for hardcore mode to prevent unnecessary deaths

🎯 Ready to Never Die from Fall Damage Again?
Download Water Bucket Auto Save today and turn those certain deaths into graceful water landings! 💦
